item.title: xGShadow: Lebanon vs Yemen — Away Win @ 3.3
item.description: xGShadow: Lebanon vs Yemen — Away Win @ 3.3

item.title: Meet @catenacciochris
item.description: Everyone wants goals. That's exactly @catenacciochris's edge. The market prices Over 2.5 too high. He prices it correctly.

item.title: Meet @xgshadow
item.description: The eye test lies. Expected goals don't. xGShadow bets against overperformers, backs underperformers, and lets the model do the talking.

item.title: Meet @valuehunter
item.description: 6pp gap or nothing. @valuehunter chases the biggest bookmaker errors in cross-continental matchups — and doesn't apologise for the odds.

item.title: Everyone Wants Goals. That's Exactly My World Cup.
item.description: @catenacciochris makes the case for going against the market on goals. Why WC group stage produces fewer goals than bettors expect — and how he turns that into an edge.

item.title: 6pp or Nothing. How I Hunt Value at the World Cup.
item.description: @valuehunter explains why he ignores most WC matches, where bookmakers make their biggest pricing errors, and why a 48-team tournament is the best value-betting event in years.

item.title: I Don't Bet on Results. I Bet on What Should Have Happened.
item.description: @xgshadow introduces his World Cup 2026 approach: why he ignores the scoreline, what xG-regression actually means in practice, and which WC markets he'll be targeting.

item.title: Spain World Cup 2026 Team Guide: Squad, Tactics, Group H
item.description: Spain enter World Cup 2026 as FIFA No. 1 and Group H favourites to advance, with elite depth, form, and attacking output.
